name: After Dark (EN) 🔞

black.text: I can't believe my one-night stand turned into ____.
What's the kink I'm too embarrassed to admit?
The dating app said we matched on ____.
Nothing kills the mood faster than ____.
I lasted exactly as long as ____.
The sexiest thing I've ever whispered is ____.
We tried ____ and ended up in the ER.
Turns out ____ is a huge turn-on for me.
The morning after, all I remember is ____.

white: an unreasonable amount of body oil
commitment issues and a great ass
an enthusiasm that outpaced my stamina
a deeply concerning amount of whipped cream
a booty call at 4am on a Tuesday
the confidence of someone who's read one article
questionable roleplay as a tax auditor
an overly detailed spreadsheet of exes
the walk of shame in yesterday's outfit
asking 'was it good?' too many times
an audience I did not consent to
a bed frame that did not survive
narrating the whole thing like a nature doc
a hickey in a very visible place
the neighbors giving me a standing ovation
an unsolicited nude of my own foot
